# cmux Skills Reference

Source: https://github.com/manaflow-ai/cmux/tree/main/skills
Imported from commit: 8627dc92a8e1551c805a4ccbc40673bb0742de63
Imported on: 2026-05-24

Purpose: reference material for creating custom personal skills in this repo.

These files are intentionally stored under `references/external/`, not `skills/`, so `ai-setup` does not install them into live agent skill roots.
